title: Linux udev
description: Linux udev documents overview material for udev in the system domain. It is classified as an operation page for the kernel class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights udev, xx-descriptive-name.rules, and Example, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include linux udev, and system, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is system / udev / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
